title: Will It Fit? — Can You Actually Run That Open-Weight Model?
tagline: Pick an open-weight LLM (Kimi K3, LongCat-2.0, GPT-OSS…), a quantization, and your GPU or Azure VM — instantly see if it fits in VRAM and how fast it decodes. 100% in your browser, no API key.
description: In-browser VRAM & throughput calculator for open-weight LLMs: quantization + KV cache math vs real GPUs and Azure VMs. No API key.
